CREATE TABLE time_intervals (start_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO time_intervals VALUES (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 5 HOUR);
INSERT INTO time_intervals VALUES (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL 1 HOUR, INTERVAL 2 HOUR);
SELECT start_time, duration, start_time - duration AS end_time FROM time_intervals;
SELECT start_time - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS new_time FROM time_intervals WHERE duration > INTERVAL 1 HOUR;
INSERT INTO another_intervals VALUES (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL 3 HOUR);
SELECT a.start_time, a.duration, a.start_time - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS modified_time, b.ending_time FROM time_intervals a JOIN another_intervals b ON a.start_time < b.ending_time;
SELECT (SELECT start_time FROM time_intervals LIMIT 1) - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE AS adjusted_time;
SELECT (SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AS current_minus_interval;
INSERT INTO complex_intervals VALUES (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL 10 HOUR), (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL 4 HOUR);
SELECT ci.time_value, ci.time_value - INTERVAL (SELECT MAX(duration) FROM time_intervals) AS adjusted_time FROM complex_intervals ci;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_intervals) AS total_intervals, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL (SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM duration)) FROM time_intervals)) AS average_adjusted_time;
